_comment: Project-local pi settings. Project resources in .pi/skills, .pi/prompts, .pi/agents, and .pi/extensions are auto-discovered; don't enumerate them here.
_envOverrides: The bash tool sources ./.ttrpg/scripts/pi-shell.sh via shellCommandPrefix. That script sets TTRPG_* paths, sources project .env for optional feature/API keys, sets QMD_CONFIG_DIR, XDG_CACHE_HOME, and QMD_LLAMA_GPU, and makes plain `qmd ...` commands project-local with lazy bootstrap. .ttrpg/scripts/pi-launch.sh and .ttrpg/scripts/pi-isolated.sh apply the same env for direct/manual qmd use. Don't put secrets in settings.json; pi only does deep merge on JSON.
